([Malay](/wiki/Malay_language "Malay language"): *Menteri Kerja Raya*; [Jawi](/wiki/Jawi_script "Jawi script"): منتري كرجا راي‎) has been [Alexander Nanta Linggi](/wiki/Alexander_Nanta_Linggi "Alexander Nanta Linggi") since 3 December 2022. The current **Minister of Works** ([Malay](/wiki/Malay_language "Malay language"): *Menteri Kerja Raya*; [Jawi](/wiki/Jawi_script "Jawi script"): منتري كرجا راي‎) has been [Alexander Nanta Linggi](/wiki/Alexander_Nanta_Linggi "Alexander Nanta Linggi") since 3 December 2022. The Minister has been assisted by Deputy Minister [Ahmad Maslan](/wiki/Ahmad_Maslan "Ahmad Maslan") since 12 December 2023. The Minister administers the portfolio through the [Ministry of Works](/wiki/Ministry_of_Works_(Malaysia) "Ministry of Works (Malaysia)").

## List of ministers

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Minister_of_Works_(Malaysia)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: List of ministers")]

The following individuals have been appointed as Minister of Works, or any of its precedent titles:[[1]](#cite_note-1)

**Political party:**
  [Alliance Party](/wiki/Alliance_Party_(Malaysia) "Alliance Party (Malaysia)")/[BN](/wiki/Barisan_Nasional "Barisan Nasional")
  [PH](/wiki/Pakatan_Harapan "Pakatan Harapan")
  [GPS](/wiki/Gabungan_Parti_Sarawak "Gabungan Parti Sarawak")
